{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = RG-9
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[RG-9]] is a room containing prisoners.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18">''The Knight'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|All the doors marked “RG” led onto rooms filled with prisoners.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
